caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a brown wooden podium, delivering a speech in front of a green marbled wall with a textured, geometric pattern. He is wearing a light-colored Nehru jacket over a long-sleeved cream shirt. Two microphones are attached to the podium, extending toward him. To his side, a tall gold-colored column with floral arrangements in pink is partially visible. In the initial sequence, he is captured speaking while raising his right index finger to emphasize a point. As the sequence progresses, he lowers his hand, shifts his posture, and gestures toward his chest with his right hand while continuing to speak. The background and setting remain constant throughout the clip, focusing solely on his movements and facial expressions as he addresses an audience.
